title: T1.1: Fix pyproject.toml build backend — Change `build-backend` from `"setuptools.backends._legacy:_Backend"` to `"setuptools.build_meta"` in `server/pyproject.toml`. Acceptance: `server/pyproject.toml` contains `build-backend = "setuptools.build_meta"` and `pip install server/` succeeds. Files: `server/pyproject.toml`
